other_specify.label: Soccer Moms
other_specify.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
other_specify.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
tooltip.body: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

other_specify.label: White Working Class
other_specify.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

other_specify.label: Barstool Conservatives
other_specify.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
other_specify.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

tooltip.title: Barstool Conservatives

other_specify.label: Disaffected Young Men
other_specify.demographic_composition: Male, Gen Z or Millennials, Other party affiliation

tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

represents_louisiana_well.label: Barstool Conservatives
represents_louisiana_well.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: Barstool Conservatives
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

other_specify.label: White Working Class

other_specify.label: Barstool Conservatives
other_specify.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
other_specify.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Barstool Conservatives
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: White Working Class

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: Barstool Conservatives
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

other_specify.label: White Working Class

tooltip.title: White Working Class

other_specify.label: Barstool Conservatives
other_specify.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
other_specify.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Barstool Conservatives
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: Soccer Moms
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: White Working Class
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: Barstool Conservatives
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Barstool Conservatives
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Soccer Moms
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: White Working Class
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Barstool Conservatives
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Barstool Conservatives
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: Tradwifes
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Female, Millennials or Gen Z, Republican, Protestant or Catholic, Suburban or Rural
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.label: Blue-Collar Men
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Male, White, No college, Poor or Below median income, Suburban or Rural
strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.rationale: The kitchen-table economics voter. Cares about wages, trade, and cost of living more than culture war. prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Soccer Moms
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: White Working Class

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Barstool Conservatives
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Soccer Moms
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
tooltip.body: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: White Working Class
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Barstool Conservatives
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Barstool Conservatives
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

tooltip.body: The kitchen-table economics voter. Cares about wages, trade, and cost of living more than culture war. Overlaps with but is distinct from Barstool Conservatives — these guys are family-first, not libertine. Their economic anxiety is a recurring media theme.

other_specify.label: GenX Forgotten Middle
other_specify.rationale: Perpetually overlooked in media that ping-pongs between Boomers and Gen Z. But GenX is in peak earning and voting years, and their independent streak makes them genuinely persuadable.

tooltip.title: GenX Forgotten Middle
tooltip.subtitle: GenX, Other party affiliation, Suburban
tooltip.body: Perpetually overlooked in media that ping-pongs between Boomers and Gen Z. But GenX is in peak earning and voting years, and their independent streak makes them genuinely persuadable.

other_specify.label: Secular Suburbanites
other_specify.demographic_composition: Suburban, Not religious, College completed or Graduate degree
other_specify.rationale: The fastest-growing religious demographic is no religion at all. As 'nones' concentrate in suburbs, they look like a coherent voting bloc — socially liberal, fiscally moderate, allergic to culture-war messaging.

tooltip.title: Secular Suburbanites
tooltip.subtitle: Suburban, Not religious, College completed or Graduate degree
tooltip.body: The fastest-growing religious demographic is no religion at all. As 'nones' concentrate in suburbs, they look like a coherent voting bloc — socially liberal, fiscally moderate, allergic to culture-war messaging.

tooltip.title: Black Rural Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: Black - rural - no college
tooltip.body: An overlooked but consequential bloc in the rural South and Black Belt. Their political weight can be felt in tight races across multiple Southern states.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Soccer Moms
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White

Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: White Working Class
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Barstool Conservatives
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Tradwifes

impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: White Working Class

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Barstool Conservatives
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

tooltip.body: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: White Working Class
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Barstool Conservatives
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Disaffected Young Men

impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The emerging wildcard of American elections. Low-propensity, politically homeless, over-indexed on alternative media. Both parties competing for them. Their turnout alone can shift margins by 2-4 points in swing states.

tooltip.body: The floor of the Republican coalition. Their mobilization determines whether GOP candidates hit their targets in virtually every state. Post-Dobbs, media watches whether this group stays energized or fractures over candidate quality.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: MAGA Country
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The margin machine for Republicans. Their ever-increasing turnout in non-metro areas offsets Democratic gains in suburbs. Media covers them as the cultural heartbeat of the populist right. Any sign of turnout fatigue here is a major story.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Tradwifes
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Female, Millennials or Gen Z, Republican, Protestant or Catholic, Suburban or Rural
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. Gained massive visibility in 2024 as a cultural counterpoint to progressive feminism. Media watches them because the tradwife trend was seen as a leading indicator of Trump's win among white women.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. Gained massive visibility in 2024 as a cultural counterpoint to progressive feminism. Media watches them because the tradwife trend was seen as a leading indicator of Trump's win among white women.

tooltip.title: Tradwifes
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Millennials or Gen Z, Republican, Protestant or Catholic, Suburban or Rural
tooltip.body: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. Gained massive visibility in 2024 as a cultural counterpoint to progressive feminism. Media watches them because the tradwife trend was seen as a leading indicator of Trump's win among white women.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Young Black Men
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: A small but symbolically enormous group. Any movement away from Democrats gets massive media coverage because it threatens a core assumption of the Democratic coalition. Even marginal shifts carry outsize narrative weight.

tooltip.title: Young Black Men
tooltip.subtitle: Male, Black, Gen Z
tooltip.body: A small but symbolically enormous group. Any movement away from Democrats gets massive media coverage because it threatens a core assumption of the Democratic coalition. Even marginal shifts carry outsize narrative weight.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Country Club Republicans
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Republican, Suburban, Rich (125k+), College completed or Graduate degree
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: The Republican voters most likely to defect on candidate quality. Their movement in wealthy suburbs (Bucks County, Maricopa, Gwinnett) decided multiple swing states. If they hold for the GOP, the party is strong.

tooltip.title: Country Club Republicans
tooltip.subtitle: Republican, Suburban, Rich (125k+), College completed or Graduate degree
tooltip.body: The Republican voters most likely to defect on candidate quality. Their movement in wealthy suburbs (Bucks County, Maricopa, Gwinnett) decided multiple swing states. If they hold for the GOP, the party is strong.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Hispanic Soccer Moms
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: An emerging swing bloc. More moderate than progressive activists, more engaged than working-class Hispanic men. As Sun Belt suburbs diversify, this group increasingly determines outcomes in AZ, NV, and TX.

tooltip.title: Hispanic Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Hispanic, Suburban, College completed
tooltip.body: An emerging swing bloc. More moderate than progressive activists, more engaged than working-class Hispanic men. As Sun Belt suburbs diversify, this group increasingly determines outcomes in AZ, NV, and TX.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Tech Bros

tooltip.title: Tech Bros

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Kennedy Catholics
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: The original swing demographic in American politics. White Catholics lean R, Hispanic Catholics are contested. Cross-pressured on abortion, immigration, and social welfare. Distributed across every swing state.

tooltip.title: Kennedy Catholics
tooltip.subtitle: Catholic, Suburban or Urban
tooltip.body: The original swing demographic in American politics. White Catholics lean R, Hispanic Catholics are contested. Cross-pressured on abortion, immigration, and social welfare. Distributed across every swing state.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Red State Women
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Female, White, No college, Republican, Suburban or Rural
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: Often overlooked in media's focus on college-educated suburban women. They are a massive and growing part of the Republican base. Their concerns — inflation, safety, family affordability — drive GOP messaging. Trump gained among them in 2024.

tooltip.title: Red State Women
tooltip.subtitle: Female, White, No college, Republican, Suburban or Rural
tooltip.body: Often overlooked in media's focus on college-educated suburban women. They are a massive and growing part of the Republican base. Their concerns — inflation, safety, family affordability — drive GOP messaging. Trump gained among them in 2024.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Blue-Collar Men
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Male, White, No college, Poor or Below median income, Suburban or Rural
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: The kitchen-table economics voter. Cares about wages, trade, and cost of living more than culture war. Overlaps with but is distinct from Barstool Conservatives — these guys are family-first, not libertine. Their economic anxiety is a recurring media theme.

tooltip.title: Blue-Collar Men

tooltip.subtitle: GenX, Other party affiliation, Suburban

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Suburban, Not religious, College completed or Graduate degree

tooltip.title: Black Rural Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: Black - rural - no college
tooltip.body: An overlooked but consequential bloc in the rural South and Black Belt. Their political weight can be felt in tight races across multiple Southern states.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Soccer Moms
healthcare_background_understands_medica.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
tooltip.body: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: White Working Class
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Barstool Conservatives
healthcare_background_understands_medica.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

tooltip.title: Barstool Conservatives

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Disaffected Young Men

healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: The emerging wildcard of American elections. Low-propensity, politically homeless, over-indexed on alternative media. Both parties competing for them. Their turnout alone can shift margins by 2-4 points in swing states.

strong_supporter_of_trump_policies.demographic_composition: Male, White, No college, Poor or Below median income, Suburban or Rural

Overlaps with but is distinct from Barstool Conservatives — these guys are family-first, not libertine. Their economic anxiety is a recurring media theme.

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Soccer Moms

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Barstool Conservatives
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Tradwifes

represents_louisiana_well.label: Soccer Moms
represents_louisiana_well.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

represents_louisiana_well.label: White Working Class
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college

represents_louisiana_well.label: Barstool Conservatives
represents_louisiana_well.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Soccer Moms

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: White Working Class

tooltip.title: White Working Class

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Barstool Conservatives
healthcare_background_understands_medica.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

tooltip.body: An overlooked but consequential bloc in the rural South and Black Belt. Their political weight can be felt in tight races across multiple Southern states.

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Soccer Moms
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: White Working Class
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Barstool Conservatives
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

prefer_him_over_other_candidates.label: Tradwifes
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.demographic_composition: Female, Millennials or Gen Z, Republican, Protestant or Catholic, Suburban or Rural
prefer_him_over_other_candidates.rationale: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: A culturally ascendant archetype driven by social media. Embraces traditional gender roles, homemaking aesthetics, and conservative family values. Gained massive visibility in 2024 as a cultural counterpoint to progressive feminism. Media watches them because the tradwife trend was seen as a leading indicator of Trump's win among white women.

tooltip.title: Tradwifes
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Millennials or Gen Z, Republican, Protestant or Catholic, Suburban or Rural

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Young Black Men
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: A small but symbolically enormous group. Any movement away from Democrats gets massive media coverage because it threatens a core assumption of the Democratic coalition. Even marginal shifts carry outsize narrative weight.

tooltip.title: Young Black Men
tooltip.subtitle: Male, Black, Gen Z
tooltip.body: A small but symbolically enormous group. Any movement away from Democrats gets massive media coverage because it threatens a core assumption of the Democratic coalition. Even marginal shifts carry outsize narrative weight.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Country Club Republicans
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Republican, Suburban, Rich (125k+), College completed or Graduate degree
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The Republican voters most likely to defect on candidate quality. Their movement in wealthy suburbs (Bucks County, Maricopa, Gwinnett) decided multiple swing states. If they hold for the GOP, the party is strong.

tooltip.title: Country Club Republicans

tooltip.body: The original swing demographic in American politics. White Catholics lean R, Hispanic Catholics are contested. Cross-pressured on abortion, immigration, and social welfare. Distributed across every swing state.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Red State Women
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Female, White, No college, Republican, Suburban or Rural
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: Often overlooked in media's focus on college-educated suburban women. They are a massive and growing part of the Republican base. Their concerns — inflation, safety, family affordability — drive GOP messaging. Trump gained among them in 2024.

tooltip.title: Red State Women
tooltip.subtitle: Female, White, No college, Republican, Suburban or Rural
tooltip.body: Often overlooked in media's focus on college-educated suburban women. They are a massive and growing part of the Republican base. Their concerns — inflation, safety, family affordability — drive GOP messaging. Trump gained among them in 2024.

impeach_trump_respect_decision.label: Blue-Collar Men
impeach_trump_respect_decision.demographic_composition: Male, White, No college, Poor or Below median income, Suburban or Rural
impeach_trump_respect_decision.rationale: The kitchen-table economics voter. Cares about wages, trade, and cost of living more than culture war. Overlaps with but is distinct from Barstool Conservatives — these guys are family-first, not libertine. Their economic anxiety is a recurring media theme.

represents_louisiana_well.label: Soccer Moms
represents_louisiana_well.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
tooltip.body: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

represents_louisiana_well.label: White Working Class
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

represents_louisiana_well.label: Barstool Conservatives
represents_louisiana_well.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
represents_louisiana_well.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

tooltip.title: Barstool Conservatives

tooltip.body: The kitchen-table economics voter. Cares about wages, trade, and cost of living more than culture war. Overlaps with but is distinct from Barstool Conservatives — these guys are family-first, not libertine. Their economic anxiety is a recurring media theme.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: GenX Forgotten Middle
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: Perpetually overlooked in media that ping-pongs between Boomers and Gen Z. But GenX is in peak earning and voting years, and their independent streak makes them genuinely persuadable.

tooltip.title: GenX Forgotten Middle
tooltip.subtitle: GenX, Other party affiliation, Suburban
tooltip.body: Perpetually overlooked in media that ping-pongs between Boomers and Gen Z. But GenX is in peak earning and voting years, and their independent streak makes them genuinely persuadable.

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Secular Suburbanites
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.demographic_composition: Suburban, Not religious, College completed or Graduate degree
independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.rationale: The fastest-growing religious demographic is no religion at all. As 'nones' concentrate in suburbs, they look like a coherent voting bloc — socially liberal, fiscally moderate, allergic to culture-war messaging.

tooltip.title: Secular Suburbanites
tooltip.subtitle: Suburban, Not religious, College completed or Graduate degree

independent_decisions_not_party_pressure.label: Black Rural Working Class

tooltip.title: Black Rural Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: Black - rural - no college
tooltip.body: An overlooked but consequential bloc in the rural South and Black Belt. Their political weight can be felt in tight races across multiple Southern states.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Soccer Moms
healthcare_background_understands_medica.demographic_composition: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

tooltip.title: Soccer Moms
tooltip.subtitle: Female, Suburban, College completed or Graduate degree, White
tooltip.body: The single most-watched voter group in American politics since the 1990s. Swung toward Democrats in 2018/2020, shifted back in parts of 2024. Their education level, suburban geography, and sensitivity to tone/culture-war issues make them the ultimate bellwether for competitive House and Senate races nationwide.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: White Working Class
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

tooltip.title: White Working Class
tooltip.subtitle: White, No college
tooltip.body: The realignment story of the last decade. This group's shift from Obama to Trump remade the electoral map. Any erosion or consolidation in this bloc makes front-page news because it directly determines outcomes in PA, MI, WI, and Sun Belt exurbs.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Barstool Conservatives
healthcare_background_understands_medica.demographic_composition: Male, Gen X or Millennials, No college or College completed, Republican or Other party
healthcare_background_understands_medica.rationale: Culturally conservative but socially libertarian — anti-woke but pro-choice, pro-legal weed, pro-gambling. Credited with helping propel Trump to victory in 2024 through alternative media (Rogan, Barstool Sports, UFC). Not church-right but vibes-right. Their turnout and enthusiasm is a leading indicator of populist energy, and both parties are now scrambling to understand them.

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Disaffected Young Men

healthcare_background_understands_medica.label: Tradwifes

key_takeaways: Among voters who want to replace Cassidy, the top reason is his vote to impeach Trump (30.3%), followed by the view that he is too moderate (18.5%).
Among voters who would re-elect Cassidy, 21.5% say he represents Louisiana well in Washington, and 20.1% value his independent decision-making.
content.methodology_note: We estimate a machine learning ensemble that predicts opinion as a function of party, geography, age, sex, education, income, religion, race, and contextual variables. We generate predicted probabilities for detailed demographic cells and post-stratify them to the county, congressional district, state house, and state senate levels using turnout-adjusted population weights before aggregating to the national level. Reported differences (e.g., rural vs. urban) reflect differences in predicted support for those populations as they are composed—including their partisan and demographic makeup—rather than simple unweighted survey averages. As a result, rural–urban differences are not strictly ceteris paribus; they partly reflect differences in partisan composition. For ceteris paribus-style comparisons, we report within-group breakdowns and crosstabs (e.g., rural vs. urban within party).
